landing.heroSubtitle: Spliit makes shared expenses effortless. Scan a receipt, split it your way, and settle up — with AI that does the heavy lifting.
quotes: "I'll Venmo you later" — they never do.
"Wait, do I owe you or do you owe me?"
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built for real friend groups, roommates, and travel crews — not accountants.

features.scanDescription: Point your camera at any receipt. Spliit reads it instantly — items, amounts, totals — and pre-fills your expense automatically.
features.confirmDescription: No more guessing if someone actually paid. Mark a payment, the other person confirms. Both sides stay honest.
features.currencyDescription: Split expenses across currencies with live exchange rates. Perfect for trips abroad or international friend groups.
features.whatsappDescription: One tap sends a polite nudge straight to the debtor's WhatsApp. No awkward texts needed — Spliit does it for you.
features.simplifyDescription: In a group of 5, you shouldn't need 10 transfers. Spliit calculates the minimum number of payments to settle everyone up.
features.balancesDescription: See exactly who owes who across every group, with a full activity timeline of expenses and settlements.

landing.ctaSubtitle: Sign up free and settle your next shared expense in under a minute.

sections.heading: Information that is gathered from visitors
sections.body: In common with other websites, log files are stored on the web server saving details such as the visitor's IP address, browser type, referring page and time of visit. Cookies may be used to remember visitor preferences when interacting with the website. Where registration is required, the visitor's email, and a username will be stored on the server.

sections.heading: How the Information is used
sections.body: The information is used to enhance the visitor's experience when using the website to display personalized content and possibly advertising. E-mail addresses will not be sold, rented or leased to 3rd parties. E-mail may be sent to inform you of news of our services or offers by us or our affiliates.

sections.heading: Visitor Options
sections.body: If you have subscribed to one of our services, you may unsubscribe by following the instructions which are included in the email that you receive. You may be able to block cookies via your browser settings but this may prevent you from access to certain features of the website.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: Cookies are small digital signature files that are stored by your web browser that allow your preferences to be recorded when visiting the website. Also, they may be used to track your return visits to the website. 3rd party advertising companies may also use cookies for tracking purposes.

groupSettings.title: Group settings
groupSettings.currencyChangeWarning: Changing the base currency affects how balances are displayed going forward. Past expenses already converted are not recalculated.
groupSettings.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete all expenses, settlements, and members. This cannot be undone.

groupDetail.inviteYourGroupSubtitle: Share a link so others can join and split expenses with you.
groupDetail.deleteExpenseMessage: This will permanently remove the expense and update all balances. This cannot be undone.
groupDetail.inviteLinkMessage: Share this link with anyone you want to add to {{name}}. It expires in 7 days.
